text: One of the best games ever. The graphics are ok, but the mechanics are immaculate. I won't even mention the story and the sound design! Totally recommend it!
An absolute masterpiece of storytelling. The emotional weight is incredible and the sound design makes every encounter terrifying.
The atmosphere and world-building are top notch. Combat is precise and rewarding.
I can see why people love it, but it's just too punishing for me. The gothic art style is beautiful though.
Redefined open world exploration. Losing yourself in this world is magical.
